title: Achromatic lenses and lenses having diffractive profiles with irregular width for vision treatment
abstract: Apparatuses, systems and methods for providing improved ophthalmic lenses, particularly intraocular lenses (IOLs), include features for providing improved extended depth of focus lenses. Exemplary ophthalmic lenses can include an optic including a diffractive profile including at least one set of echelettes, each echelette of the set having a different width in r-squared space than any other echelette of the set and the at least one set of echelettes repeating at least once upon the optic.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. An ophthalmic lens comprising: an optic including a diffractive profile including at least one set of echelettes, each echelette of the set having a different width in r-squared space than any other echelette of the set and the at least one set of echelettes repeating at least once upon the optic. 2. The ophthalmic lens of claim 1 , wherein the at least one set of echelettes includes two echelettes. 3. The ophthalmic lens of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the at least one set of echelettes includes at least three echelettes. 4. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-3, wherein the at least one set of echelettes includes at least four echelettes. 5. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-4, wherein a first one of the set of echelettes repeats adjacent to a second one of the set of echelettes. 6. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-5, wherein the at least one set of echelettes repeats along an entire pupillary zone of the optic. 7. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-6, wherein the at least one set of echelettes repeats at least twice upon the optic. 8. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-7, wherein the at least one set of echelettes repeats at least three times upon the optic. 9. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-8, wherein at least one echelette of the set is configured to distribute light to a near focus or to an intermediate focus. 10. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-9, wherein at least two of the echelettes of the set have a different step height. 11. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-10, wherein at least two of the echelettes of the set have a same step height. 12. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-11, wherein the diffractive profile forms an extended depth of focus or the diffractive profile modifies chromatic aberration in a distance focus. 13. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-12, wherein the optic includes a central zone and a peripheral zone, and the diffractive profile is positioned on the central zone, and the peripheral zone includes a refractive surface. 14. The ophthalmic lens of claim 13, wherein the central zone includes a refractive surface positioned radially inward of the diffractive profile. 15. The ophthalmic lens of any of claims 1-14, wherein the optic includes a refractive surface providing one or more of an intermediate focus, a near focus, or an extended depth of focus. 16. A method comprising: fabricating an optic for an ophthalmic lens, the optic including a diffractive profile including at least one set of echelettes, each echelette of the set having a different width in r- squared space than any other echelette of the set and the at least one set of echelettes repeating at least once upon the optic. 17. The method of claim 17, further comprising determining one or more of the diffractive profile or a refractive profile of the optic based on the ophthalmic lens prescription. 19. The method of any of claims 16-22, wherein at least two of the echelettes of the set have a different step height. 24. The method of any of claims 16-24, wherein at least one echelette of the set is configured to distribute light to a near focus or to an intermediate focus. 26.
